rule_name: Privilege Escalation - User Added to Local Administrators Group
search_query: index=windows EventCode=4732 | table _time, Computer, TargetUserName, MemberName, SubjectUserName | rename MemberName as "Added_User", SubjectUserName as "Performed_By"
description: Detects when a user account is added to the local Administrators group. Unauthorized granting of administrative privileges is a major indicator of an attacker attempting to gain full control over a system.
